title: IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions:
IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions!
